name: Catan Board Game (5th Edition)
description: The world's best-selling strategy board game. In Catan, players settle an island, gather resources, and build roads, settlements, and cities in a race to 10 victory points. No two games are ever alike thanks to the modular hex board. Perfect for 3–4 players aged 10+ and endlessly replayable for families and friends.

specifications.value: 19 hex terrain tiles, 6 sea frame pieces, 9 harbour pieces, 18 number tokens, 95 resource cards, 25 development cards, 4 building cost cards, 2 special cards, 16 cities, 20 settlements, 60 roads, 2 dice, robber piece

additionalInfo.value: Catan: 5-6 Player Extension, Seafarers, Cities & Knights, Traders & Barbarians
All components as listed in specifications, full colour rulebook

reviews.title: The gateway drug to board gaming
reviews.reviewText: Catan introduced me to modern board games 10 years ago and it still hits the table regularly. Every game tells a different story. The trading and negotiation elements create tension and hilarity in equal measure. Essential.

reviews.title: Perfect family game night staple
reviews.reviewText: We play this every Friday night. Our kids aged 11 and 13 are obsessed. It teaches resource management and negotiation without feeling educational. The modular board keeps every game fresh.

reviews.title: Classic for good reason
reviews.reviewText: Genuinely one of the greatest games ever designed. Only issue is it can cause friendly arguments when someone blocks your road or steals your resources! Not a flaw — that IS the game. Brilliant.

reviews.title: Converted all my friends into board gamers
reviews.reviewText: Brought this to a house party where nobody had played it before. Within 30 minutes everyone was fully engrossed and we played three games in a row. Now six of my friends own copies of their own.

reviews.title: 30 years old and still unmatched
reviews.reviewText: Klaus Teuber created something timeless. The elegance of the design — simple rules, deep strategy, endless replayability — has never been bettered. A must-own for any household.
